blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
